title: Marketplace Manager - Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a Marketplace Manager for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Licious Consulting Pvt Ltd!
